arts.ttl: ‘Sometimes you shout against the wind’ - Crystal Palace wanted Arsenal clash moved ahead of FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: The Eagles, who play Aston Villa at Wembley on Saturday in the FA Cup semi-final, have one day fewer to prepare for the clash as Unai Emery’s side played Manchester City on Tuesday night. Oliver Glasner has revealed that Crystal Palace wanted to move their Premier League clash against Arsenal on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Leroy Sane: Arsenal target turns down ‘HUGE’ offer with €45m contract still on the table
arts.sum: Arsenal have been given a major update on the future of Leroy Sane, the Bayern Munich winger who could act as an alternative to Nico Williams should they miss out on the Athletic Club and Spain star. The winger is locked in contract talks with the Bundesliga leaders, who are offering him a three-year deal worth a maximum of €15m per season.
